description_long: This is a compact, modern chaise upholstered in a rich teal fabric, featuring a gently curved backrest with vertical channel tufting for added texture and visual interest. The backrest wraps around the sides, creating a semi-enclosed seating area that offers both comfort and support. The seat cushion is thick and seamlessly integrated, providing a plush and inviting surface for sitting. The chaise stands on four slender, slightly tapered black legs that elevate the piece and give it a light, airy appearance. The overall silhouette is rounded and contemporary, with smooth lines and a minimalist aesthetic. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A modern teal chaise with a curved, channel-tufted backrest and slim black legs, offering a plush and inviting seat. Its rounded silhouette and minimalist design make it ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full curved backrest with vertical channel tufting and the wide, plush seat.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the depth of the seat and the gentle curve of the backrest wrapping around one side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous backrest with no visible tufting or seams, and the slim black legs.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view reveals the other side of the chaise, emphasizing the symmetry and curvature of the design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, smoothly curved, and features vertical channel tufting that adds both structure and visual interest. It wraps around the sides, creating a semi-enclosed, cocoon-like seating area.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise does not have distinct armrests; the backrest curves around to partially enclose the sides, serving as a low, integrated arm support.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slim, straight, and slightly tapered, made of black-finished metal, and are positioned at each corner for stability. They have a minimalist, modern appearance with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid teal fabric with visible vertical channel tufting on the backrest, giving it a textured, segmented look. The seat and back are otherwise smooth and unpatterned.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, integrated seat cushion that spans the width of the chaise, with no separate or loose cushions visible. The backrest is padded and seamlessly attached, providing continuous support.
